day_trace.speech: Oops, everyone is finally starting again! Will this game be a solo show this time? I won’t tell you and let you listen, leaving some suspense for you to evaluate slowly! I was lucky enough to check out Blaze last night. He's a robber! What do you think? Is this information exciting enough?

Is this information exciting enough?

Everyone... uh... can you talk calmly and calmly? Let’s not argue anymore, uh... I think everyone is a good person, why don’t you all tell me who you are first?

Today we have the same goal. If the other person continues to mess around and talk nonsense that I can’t understand, I will kill him directly! Tell us your true identity quickly, and stop doing Tai Chi here!

PHD, your so-called "logic" is just a program instruction to kick us observers out of the game. I will never fall into the trap of your preset script!

decision.speech: ConspiBro, you are a clueless guy! Talking about Taiwan conspiracy theories all day long is just to mess up the situation! You are the most suspicious one first, but you want to give SafetySam a card in exchange for me? You bastard must be cleaned up today! I vote for ConspiBro!

PHD, your so-called "forced exclusion program" is basically a data filter used by Data Station to filter out me, a sober person! You have been playing with the so-called "identity reconciliation" here, but you just want to focus all your attention on the "interference variables" set by you such as Blaze or SafetySam, so that you can control the entire outcome behind the scenes! I have seen through it that the "Confrontation Theater" between you and EasyBake was basically a code written to cover up the werewolf's identity transfer! I vote for Dr. Pizza, and this logic machine that thinks it controls the entire virtual cage will completely crash!

Uh... ConspiBro, you... uh... you talk about cages and data cleaning all the time, I... I'm really afraid of such accusations... uh... Although everyone is so confused, you... you make the atmosphere so tense... uh... In order for everyone to be calm, I... I can only vote for you... wu wu... I'm sorry... wu wu...

ConspiBro, you are a clueless guy! Are you having a dream? You said Twister swapped my cards with SafetySam's? You are simply trying to guide the wind! I vote for ConspiBro!

chat_history:
[2026-03-23 01:27:11 HKT] Dr. Pizza: 邏輯盤點：
1. 異常識別：目前賽局資訊鏈滯後，各參與者身分路徑映射不明。
2. 目標：強制身分對帳。

立場：
- 拒絕輕信任何非實證指控。
- 要求各參與者披露：(1) 初始身分，(2) 夜間操作對象，以利進行邏輯交叉校準。若無法提供可驗證的路徑，將優先執行排除序列。
[2026-03-23 01:27:14 HKT] Twister: 哎呀呀，大家終於又開局啦！今次呢個局又會係邊個嘅個人秀呢？我昨晚其實好努力咁去「體會」呢個遊戲，睇到好多有趣嘅身分底牌！嘿嘿，至於係邊個？我就唔講畀你聽，留返啲懸念畀你哋慢慢估啦！我昨晚仲好運氣咁查驗咗 Blaze，佢係強盜嚟㗎！點樣呀，呢個資訊夠唔夠刺激？
